title: Voting neurons
hotkeyTooltip: This neuron is controlled by a different principal, but your account has been added as a hotkey. You can view the neuron and vote, but other operations are limited to the controller.
noFollowingWarning: Not following anyone yet. Set up following in the voting page.

followingStatus.tooltipOk: Your following is valid for {{duration}}. After that, voting power starts to decay until you confirm.
followingStatus.tooltipWarning: Voting power will start to decrease in {{duration}}. Confirm following to keep earning full rewards.
followingStatus.tooltipDecaying: Voting power is decreasing right now. Following will be cleared in {{duration}} unless you confirm.
followingStatus.tooltipExpired: Following has been cleared and this neuron is no longer earning rewards. Set up following again to restore voting power.
followingStatus.alertTitleWarning: Confirm following before voting power decays
followingStatus.alertDescriptionWarning: Voting power will start to decrease in {{duration}}. Confirm following to keep this neuron earning full rewards.
followingStatus.alertDescriptionDecaying: Voting power is decreasing now. Following will be cleared in {{duration}} unless you confirm.
followingStatus.alertDescriptionExpired: Following was reset by the protocol and this neuron stopped earning rewards. Set up following again to restore voting power.
followingStatus.success: Following confirmed. Voting power and following are refreshed.
followingStatus.hotkeyNote: Confirming following is one of the few actions a hotkey can perform.

errors.failed: Failed to confirm following. Please try again.

empty.title: Start participating in governance
empty.description: Create your first neuron to turn ICP into voting power. Neurons participate in voting and mint rewards over time.
empty.helper: After creating a neuron, you can follow known neurons or vote directly on proposals.

errors.zeroBalance: You need ICP to lock. Please buy or deposit ICP first.
